goal: Generate and review a remediation HTML package for paid leads with maximum compatibility and minimum breakage risk.
hard_constraints: Never remove or rewrite existing backend/API endpoints.
Prefer additive compliance blocks over destructive edits.
Preserve existing forms, script tags, and action URLs unless clearly malicious.
Keep output as a single valid HTML document.
ccpa_requirements: Consumer rights disclosure (know/access, delete, correct, opt-out)
Do Not Sell or Share mechanism

approve_only_if: No critical breakage risk to existing forms/APIs/scripts.
Required CCPA controls are present in the generated output.
reject_if: Any checkout, booking, auth, or critical API flow appears broken.
Generated output removes major site content.
Generated output is not parseable HTML.
